class.name: MockVisionServer
class.brief_description: Subclass of VisionServer enabling manual frame injection for unit testing and virtualization.
class.description: MockVisionServer overrides camera capture logic to return manually injected textures rather than reading from a physical webcam.

method.name: camera_create
method.description: Create a new camera resource and return its unique RID.

method.name: camera_start
method.description:
Start frame capture capture on the camera.
True if started successfully, false otherwise.
True if started successfully, false otherwise.

method.name: camera_stop
method.description: Stop frame capture and release hardware resources.

method.name: get_camera_current_texture
method.description: Retrieve the latest captured frame texture for Godot rendering.

method.name: camera_get_current_image
method.description: Retrieve the latest captured CPU image resource.

method.name: inject_texture
method.description:
Manually inject a frame texture into the mock camera.
p_camera The mock camera RID. p_texture The frame texture to inject.
The mock camera RID.
The frame texture to inject.
